TEARS). Tears are the catalyst — as Wagner realized (v. the Good Friday Spell, the tears moistening the flowers).

What I'm suggesting is that Bindswanger psychologized the three realms of Gnosticism (assented to them as subjective ways of perceiving the world; no: being in the world, Dasein). Whereas I am reasigning to them their original ontology.

Only hell (Umwelt) has the Gnostic qualities of Fremdheit and Gewarfenheit, wherein there is a prison and warders. The Gnostic picture is of o

(1) The Empire, my adversary.

(2) The revolutionary secret Christians, my colleagues.

This is my Dasein, k my way of being, in the phylogonic world. How could I ever have failed to see that the world revealed to me by anamnesis is the same as the world of the phylogons, reticulated and arborizing, with the new accretions con¬ stantly being laid down. Of course: in that phylogonic world the revolutionary secret Christian underground Is always attacking the Prison; these are precisely phylogons

effect a new view of reality in which the element of indeterminism exists at every binary (0-1) branching. Thus I experienced an abolition of the projected modem of causality, +, replacing it, [an apperception of] volitional + sentient decision-making. Upon the abolition of the projected modem of causation, +, replacing it, indeterminate decision-making (Whitehead's principle of selection [of the good]) I confronted quite a different universe (which I dubbed Valis).

Indexed
folder 90 - 015
E-33

Just consider this all in terms of the Kantian ontological ordering categories: the way (space, time + causation) our minds structure world. Then my whole model is not a scientific theory about world but Dasein itself, a way of being in world (in the Kantian sense). As to how new + radical it is, let me ask, how many worldviews (Dasein) omit causation entirely (!) + replace it with my "binary elective decision-making choosing" by a sentient, volition, self-regulatin

folder 90 - 016
E-34

We are, then, participating in + structuring reality very inadequately, to our own severe detriment. Construing causation [as real] we literally blind (occlude) ourselves to the true nature of decision-making indeterminate world. It was Malebranche who first figured this out. The ultimate victim of the category of causation is the anankastic. My 3-74 apperception (ontological ordering) of space was the Gothic vault: vertical space, medieval, not our modern day horizontal sp

folder 90 - 020
8

A worldview (Dasein) that repudiates strict causation and substitutes for it a concept of decision-making at repeated binary branchings overthrows a worldview anchored in antiquity, specifically in the Babylonian planetary determinism that dominated the ancient world. This planetary or astral determinism, with which astrology was concerned, is specifically the "ancient powers" that Paul asserts Christ will topple.
